summary: Ukrainian forces used an optical fiber FPV drone "Provod" to destroy a Polish 155mm self-propelled howitzer "AHS Krab" in the Kharkiv region. Russian operators of the Rubicon Center conducted strikes in Donbas, the Sumy direction, and near Krasny Liman on March 9, 2026, destroying 114 targets. A Russian soldier was simultaneously hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones while taking cover behind a tree.
